name: Chicken Breasts Supreme
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Cream of mushroom soup, canned, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts, skin-side-down in a shallow, heat-resistant,
non-metallic, 10-inch baking dish.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 10 minutes. Set chicken aside.
3. In a deep, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, melt 2 tablespoons
butter in Microwave Oven for 15 seconds.
4. Add onion to melted butter and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for
2 1/2 minutes or until onion is tender.
5. Add soup, milk and seasonings to onions. Stir well to combine all
ingredients.
6. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes.
7. Pour sauce over chicken and heat, covered, for 6 minutes in Microwave
Oven or until chicken is tender.
